title: diplostephium glandulosum
intro: Diplostephium glandulosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a shrubby herb with medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Diplostephium glandulosum include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Diplostephium glandulosum can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to promote healing and soothe irritated tissues.
